title: ADNOC commits $6.2bln FID for Abu Dhabi’s Umm Shaif Gas Cap
summary: Move to accelerate ADNOC’s gas growth strategy and expand LNG portfolio
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
ADNOC headquarter in Abu Dhabi. Image used for illustrative purpose. Image courtesy: Getty Images/ Marco Curaba

Move to accelerate ADNOC’s gas growth strategy and expand LNG portfolio

Staff Writer ,  ZAWYA

The Abu Dhabi National Oil Company (ADNOC) has taken the final investment decision (FID) to deploy $6.2 billion to develop the Umm Shaif Gas Cap in Abu Dhabi, along with its partners including French firm TotalEnergies, Italy’s energy company Eni and the China National Petroleum Corporation (CNPC).
